programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.sub-title: The Man in the Mexican Mask
programme.desc: A repentant Alice earns back her internship at Kate Foster PR; Jenny makes an unsettling discovery; Frankie grows suspicious of Sean.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Between Mike troubles, a Tru Air P.R. crisis and a birthday dinner with less-than-delightful in-laws, Kate's plate is full; a misstep from Alice puts Anne's book in jeopardy, and Jenny goes on the warpath for equal pay.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate and Nathan struggle with their new living arrangement; Frankie and Juniper take their investigation of Sean too far; Anne looks at her relationship with Alice in a new light.

programme.title: Small Achievable Goals
programme.desc: Julie gets passed over for a promotion and discovers she's in menopause; Kris's first day at The Podcast Folx is complicated by an unexpected period, a new co-host, and a hostile new producer: Julie.

programme.title: Small Achievable Goals
programme.desc: Julie and Kris struggle to work together while Julie is faced with her worst menopause nightmare; Kris struggles to find the confidence to host her first episode while dealing with cramps.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis and Twyla go out for a girls' night; David gets a lesson on compromise.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: A rumour that Moira died appears online; Roland asks Johnny to be the godfather of his child.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Patrick host an open mic night; Johnny and Stevie start rebranding the hotel.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: The Roses plan a barbecue; David confronts his comfort level with Patrick; Alexis investigates a mysterious text.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Stevie set out on a romantic getaway; Johnny steps in at a Jazzagals rehearsal and wows everyone with his skills; Alexis tests out a dating app.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate reaches a fork in the road; Anne figures out the truth about Alice; Jenny is guided to the light; Val takes a giant leap into love.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate faces judgment from her friends over her decision, and clashes with Mike over the Tru Air account; Anne handles a rebellious Alice with creative discipline; Frankie and Bianca navigate new waters.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Alice's new internship at Kate Foster P.R. drains Kate's resources the day of a client event, while Lionel's attempt at teaching his daughter the meaning of responsibility backfires; Frankie makes a decision Bianca may not be ready for.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.sub-title: The Man in the Mexican Mask
programme.desc: A repentant Alice earns back her internship at Kate Foster PR; Jenny makes an unsettling discovery; Frankie grows suspicious of Sean.

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: Shannon meets an unwanted guest in the HEAS parking lot and tries to balance community and impressing a new board member.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Umma search for ways to spice up their love life; Kimchee preps for his first presentation.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Kimchee's mom visits, and Jung looks forward to seeing her; Umma takes over sign duty; Gerald asks Appa for a reference letter, but Janet intervenes.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Umma invite their friends to go on vacation, accidentally; Janet accepts a photography job; Jung takes teasing too far.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: A team of reporters uses Xavier Academy to determine the true value of private schools and ends up exposing a deep, dark secret.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: An expose on Gerry costs him his job and his ability to get a new one.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry tries to gain the staff's trust after being introduced as the new principal.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark stars in a PSA for young women and meets experienced child actor Steve, who inspires him; Mike Sr. relapses at Mr. Murphy's retirement event, leading to a confrontation.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: On NYE Fox asks Mark to babysit while their parents double date; Ritche imparts advice leading to a big blowout; Mike Jr and Amanda share sparks, and Pop has a blast at home.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis and Johnny come up with a plan to impress a motel reviewer; David and Patrick look for an apartment.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny finds himself under financial pressure with the arrival of Moira's high-priced red carpet gown for the Crows movie premiere; David is conned into taking a road trip with Stevie.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Ted finally lets loose at David and Patrick's housewarming party; Johnny and Moira baby-sit Roland Jr.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira and the Jazzagals take Jocelyn to the casino; Johnny has a conversation with Stevie about intimacy in the workplace.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: In a high-pressure moment, Kate pitches an idea that isn't hers to give; Anne's publication dreams may finally come true; a new opportunity leads Frankie to expand her business; Jenny confronts her man about what he really wants.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: A quick fix at work leaves Kate in the rat trap; Anne struggles to keep her temper in check as she promotes her book; Val learns her nest isn't as empty as she thought; Frankie realizes her new employees are a mixed bag.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Anne's explosive television debut puts Kate's loyalty to the test; Frankie falls into a funk after a disaster at work; Jenny realizes her feelings for MCP might run deeper than she thought.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: After a wake-up call from Sloane, Kate adjusts her priorities; Frankie realizes she's responsible for a recent workplace tragedy; needing a break from Kate, Anne hides out at Val's.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: A team of reporters uses Xavier Academy to determine the true value of private schools and ends up exposing a deep, dark secret.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: An expose on Gerry costs him his job and his ability to get a new one.
